channel.title: GitHub Kotlin Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Kotlin in GitHub

item.title: stripe/stripe-android
item.description: Stripe Android SDK

item.title: JetBrains/kotlin
item.description: The Kotlin Programming Language.

item.title: getsentry/sentry-java
item.description: A Sentry SDK for Java, Android and other JVM languages.

item.title: Kotlin/kotlinx.coroutines
item.description: Library support for Kotlin coroutines

item.title: ethereum-lists/chains
item.description: provides metadata for chains

item.title: bmax121/APatch
item.description: The patching of Android kernel and Android system

item.title: ktorio/ktor
item.description: Framework for quickly creating connected applications in Kotlin with minimal effort

item.title: rnmapbox/maps
item.description: A Mapbox react native module for creating custom maps

item.title: null2264/yokai
item.description: Free and open source manga reader for Android

item.title: nightscout/AndroidAPS
item.description: Opensource automated insulin delivery system (closed loop)

item.title: pppscn/SmsForwarder
item.description: 短信转发器——监控Android手机短信、来电、APP通知，并根据指定规则转发到其他手机：钉钉群自定义机器人、钉钉企业内机器人、企业微信群机器人、飞书机器人、企业微信应用消息、邮箱、bark、webhook、Telegram机器人、Server酱、PushPlus、手机短信等。包括主动控制服务端与客户端，让你轻松远程发短信、查短信、查通话、查话簿、查电量等。（V3.0 新增）PS.这个APK主要是学习与自用，如有BUG请提ISSUE，同时欢迎大家提PR指正

item.title: android/nowinandroid
item.description: A fully functional Android app built entirely with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose

item.title: JetBrains/Exposed
item.description: Kotlin SQL Framework

item.title: KotatsuApp/Kotatsu
item.description: Manga reader for Android

item.title: 2dust/v2rayNG
item.description: A V2Ray client for Android, support Xray core and v2fly core

item.title: android/compose-samples
item.description: Official Jetpack Compose samples.

item.title: ChuckerTeam/chucker
item.description: 🔎 An HTTP inspector for Android & OkHTTP (like Charles but on device)

item.title: firebase/quickstart-android
item.description: Firebase Quickstart Samples for Android

item.title: yairm210/Unciv
item.description: Open-source Android/Desktop remake of Civ V

item.title: square/okhttp
item.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for the JVM, Android, and GraalVM.

item.title: JetBrains/compose-multiplatform
item.description: Compose Multiplatform, a modern UI framework for Kotlin that makes building performant and beautiful user interfaces easy and enjoyable.
